description: Legal note in Arabic script mentioning "one of the elders of Islam" (شيخ مشائخ الاسلام) mawlānā al-shaykh Aḥmad al-Ṣadīqī (?) al-muʿallim, and a woman named Sutayta who was Jewish (Sutayta al-yahūdiyya). Dated: 8 Muḥarram 1021 (11 March 1612). Merits further examination.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בערבית. מוחזק באוסף מוסרי.
